quotes.verbatim_quote: Here is another 3/4 pattern over 4/4 which starts on the “and” of beat
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines superimposing 3/4 over 4/4 starting on upbeat to teach polyrhythmic phrasing.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Practicing with these devices opens up a window in the part of the mind that hears bigger
quotes.why_load_bearing: Central pedagogical rationale: polyrhythmic superimposition internalizes large-scale form.
